class.name: ASConditionalTag
class.brief_description: Requirement/block tag for ability prerequisites and immunities (Can.Parried, Immune.Fire).
class.description:
ASConditionalTag represents tags used in logical evaluation for ability requirements and effect blockers. These are typically short-term tags that grant permissions or special conditions.
Used for ability prerequisites (Can.Parried, Can.Dodged), damage immunity (Immune.Fire, Immune.Poison), and state conditions (State.Grounded, State.Flying).
From BUSINESS_RULES.md: "Used in logical evaluation (AND/OR) for requirements." These tags participate in Required All/Any and Blocked All/Any predicates.

method.name: create
method.description: Creates a new ASConditionalTag with the specified name.

method.name: CAN_PARRY
method.description: Returns a predefined CAN_PARRY permission tag.

method.name: CAN_DODGE
method.description: Returns a predefined CAN_DODGE permission tag.

method.name: CAN_INTERRUPT
method.description: Returns a predefined CAN_INTERRUPT permission tag.

method.name: IMMUNE_FIRE
method.description: Returns a predefined IMMUNE_FIRE immunity tag.

method.name: IMMUNE_POISON
method.description: Returns a predefined IMMUNE_POISON immunity tag.

method.name: IMMUNE_PHYSICAL
method.description: Returns a predefined IMMUNE_PHYSICAL immunity tag.

method.name: GROUNDED
method.description: Returns a predefined GROUNDED state condition tag.

method.name: FLYING
method.description: Returns a predefined FLYING state condition tag.

method.name: STEALTHED
method.description: Returns a predefined STEALTHED state condition tag.
